title: bucetum × loliaceum
intro: Bucetum × loliaceum, also known as Lomatium cous, is a flowering plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Bucetum × loliaceum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of cold and flu, and promote wound healing. Bucetum × loliaceum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat specific health concerns.
